use_cases: Animated hero section backgrounds with customizable gradient colors
Landing pages requiring dynamic, eye-catching visual effects
Creative portfolios or digital experiences needing shader-based art
Product showcases that benefit from premium animated backgrounds
ai_summary: A WebGL-based 3D background component using custom GLSL shaders with React Three Fiber. Features animated noise patterns, gradient color mixing between two customizable colors, and a radial glow effect. The shader uses time-based uniforms for continuous animation and intensity modulation via sine waves, creating a dynamic, modern visual backdrop suitable for hero sections or landing pages.
